title: Allelon
desc: Play as Ollie and Spade, a rebel and detective, on both sides of a high-profile murder case, in a dual-character investigative-stealth experience. Discover the secrets plaguing the citizens of Andropolis.

title: DiceRogue
desc: This is a new type of strategic roguelike where you fight by combining "dice x cards x tiles." You can create your own strategy by linking the "special effects" of the rolling dice with the "cards" that are activated according to the roll.

title: Mash Motion: Sprint Rush
desc:
Step onto the track in Mash Motion: Sprint Rush, a fast-paced arcade sprint where four runners line up and race for victory. Compete against three rivals in a straight dash to the finish, where every race is quick, intense, and decided in seconds.

With a nostalgic pixel art style and a classic stadium setting, the game captures the spirit of retro sports titles. The focus is simple: line up, race, and aim for first place. Each run is a short burst of competition that encourages immediate replay and constant improvement.

Whether you win or fall just behind, every race pushes you to try again and chase a cleaner, faster finish.

title: Besitupia: Mediator
desc: Waking up in a mysterious bunker, you realize that you've ended up on a planet full of mysteries and dangers. Use your skills and intuition to overcome obstacles and escape to freedom.
